privileged_info_summary: The task requires generating synthetic administrative records in GNU Health. Verified the expected institution name is 'PetroChem Occupational Health Clinic', the ward name is 'Decontamination & Observation Ward', and the two bed names are 'DECON-1' and 'DECON-2'. These exactly match the instructions provided in the prompt and are enforced through SQL queries in the evaluation scripts.
